party.title: Party Composition
party.settings_desc: Set the base values for barriers and healing.
party.configuration_desc: Click a slot to focus or select a job to auto-assign.
party.my_job_instruction: Tap the star on the top right of a slot to set as My Job
party.manual_mode_desc: The next selected job will be forced into {{slot}}.

modal.name: Event Name
modal.calc_overwrite_warning: * Applying will overwrite the Damage Amount above

mitigation.no_skills: No mitigation skills available for this job.

ui.select_jobs: Select jobs from the panel above to start planning

timeline.delete_event_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
timeline.paste_hint: Click on an empty row to paste continuously
timeline.select_member: Select a member to add a mitigation:
timeline.invalid_timing: Cannot place here (due to recast etc.)
timeline.clear_all_confirm: Clear mitigations for all members. This can be undone.
timeline.clear_member_confirm: Clear mitigations for {{member}} ({{job}}). This can be undone.

sidebar.select_content_desc: Choose the content for your mitigation plan

portal.title: FFXIV Toolbox
portal.subtitle: Tools to support your adventure — mitigation planner, housing tour, and more.

miti_planner.title: Mitigation Planner
miti_planner.description: A timeline-based mitigation planning tool. Visually simulate mitigation placement for your entire party.

housing_tour.title: Housing Tour
housing_tour.description: Plan and share housing area tour routes.

tutorial.portal_select_desc: Select "Mitigation Planner" to start building your mitigation sheet!
tutorial.new_plan_desc: Click "+New Plan" in the sidebar to start. You can also load timelines created by other users by selecting a content name.
tutorial.content_select_desc: Choose the boss you want to plan for and load the timeline. You can also import from FFLogs.
tutorial.party_slots_desc: Click on slots to choose jobs. Set up 4 members first.
tutorial.party_palette_desc: No need to select slots this time! Just tap the glowing job icons and they'll auto-fill into the right slots. Pretty handy, right?
tutorial.my_job_desc: Select your own job to highlight your column, making it easier to focus on your mitigations!
tutorial.status_desc: When content is loaded, stats from the time of release are auto-set as templates. Adjust here when your gear improves.
tutorial.add_miti_desc: Add mitigations to counter enemy attacks! Click on the highlighted cell.
tutorial.add_phase_desc: Click on a time to create a phase marker. Name it to organize your timeline!
tutorial.complete_desc: Great work! You've mastered the basics. Try FFLogs Import for auto-generated timelines, or Auto Plan for automatic mitigation placement!
